title: EHDS Digital Permit
description: A digital permit document exported by an EHDS Health Data Access Body (HDAB), granting access to health data for secondary use. Matches the document shape produced by open-daams's buildDigitalPermitDocument.

permitNumber.description: Stable base permit identifier, unchanged across amendments/renewals.

version.description: Version of this permit. Incremented on amendment, renewal, or revocation appeal.

applicationId.description: Reference to the HDAB application record this permit was issued from.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this permit version was signed and issued.

validFrom.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this permit becomes valid.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this permit expires.

grantedDatasets.description: The datasets this permit grants access to, grouped by the data holder that provides them. Fixed at issuance and carried forward unchanged on later versions.

dataHolderName.description: Name of the data holder providing these datasets.

url.description: Reference URL for the dataset, if available.

issuerKid.description: RFC 7517 Key ID of the key that signed this permit. References the matching key in the issuer's JWKS.

permitId.description: Human-readable permit id: permitNumber, suffixed with "-v{version}" when version > 1.

status.description: The permit's status as recorded by the issuing HDAB at export time. Not part of the signed payload — a verifier MUST NOT treat this as authoritative and should derive current validity independently from validUntil and its own revocation information.

revocationReason.description: Reason given for revocation, if status is REVOKED. Not part of the signed payload.

revocationAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of revocation, if status is REVOKED. Not part of the signed payload.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical payload (permitNumber, version, applicationId, issuedAt, validFrom, validUntil, grantedDatasets, issuerKid; RFC 4648 §5, no padding).

signingKeyId.description: Key ID of the key that produced `signature`. Equal to issuerKid.

algorithm.description: Cryptographic algorithm used to produce the signature.
